# Akshat Gada

> Developer Relations Engineer who turns complex infrastructure into developer tools,
> documentation, demos, and communities. Most recently focused on agentic payments.
> Open to new roles. Site: https://akshatgada.com

Akshat Gada is a Developer Relations Engineer working across developer tools, documentation,
technical content, demos, and community feedback. Most recently, he worked at Polygon Labs,
where he led agentic payments initiatives after joining as an intern and moving to full-time
in 2025. His technical work centers on x402 (the HTTP 402
"Payment Required" standard for machine payments), stablecoin settlement, and cross-chain
infrastructure. He builds in the open and authors proposals and tooling for the
machine-payable web.

## Profiles
- X / Twitter: https://x.com/gada_akshat
- GitHub: https://github.com/AkshatGada
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/akshat-gada-719076228/
- Email: me@akshatgada.com

## Focus areas
- Agentic payments and the machine-payable web
- x402 — internet-native, per-request payments over HTTP for AI agents
- Stablecoin payments and onchain settlement
- Developer relations, docs, SDKs, and product-focused engineering
- Cross-chain infrastructure; zero-knowledge proofs

## Selected work
- [Agent CLI](https://polygon.technology/agent-cli) — command-line tooling for agent payments on Polygon.
- [Agentic Services](https://docs.polygon.technology/payment-services/agentic-payments/agentic-services) — a directory of services agents can discover and pay for.
- [AgentConnect](https://agentconnect.polygon.technology/) — connecting agents to onchain services.
- [Agentic payments docs](https://docs.polygon.technology/payment-services/agentic-payments/agent-integration/intro) — agent integration guide.
- [PIP-82: Agentic Commerce Gas Program](https://forum.polygon.technology/t/pip-82-agentic-commerce-gas-program/21721) — co-authored Polygon proposal offering up to $1M in base-fee rebates to x402 facilitators.
- [Polygon x402 facilitator](https://github.com/0xPolygon/x402-rs) — Rust implementation of an x402 payment facilitator.

## Polygon agentic payments impact
Led developer-facing work across Polygon Agent CLI, Agentic Services, AgentConnect, integrations,
documentation, demos, and ecosystem launches. Helped create the pathways for service providers and
developers to bring pay-per-use x402 services onto Polygon. Polygon has processed more than 24 million
x402 transactions network-wide, according to the [x402 Analytics dashboard](https://dune.com/hashed_official/x402-analytics).
Co-authored PIP-82, proposing a program of up to $1M in base-fee rebates for eligible agentic-commerce
transactions.

## Experience
- Polygon Labs — Developer Relations Engineer, agentic payments (intern → full-time, 2025–2026).
- Ethereum Protocol Fellowship — EIP-4881 work in Lodestar (ChainSafe).
- Witness Chain — RSA accumulator research; EigenLayer AVS.
- JP Morgan — zero-knowledge research; ML circuits in Circom, Noir, and Rust.
- BOBDAO — co-founder.

## Writing
- [Writing index](https://akshatgada.com/blog/) — essays on agentic payments, x402, and the machine-payable web.
- [x402 just grew up](https://akshatgada.com/blog/x402-foundation.html) — on the Linux Foundation launching the x402 Foundation; Polygon as an early x402 contributor and founding member, and why an open payments standard matters for agentic payments.
- [Cloudflare just turned on the meter](https://akshatgada.com/blog/cloudflare-402.html) — on Cloudflare's x402 Monetization Gateway and the start of the agent economy; how Polygon's facilitator, Agent CLI, and Agentic Services fit.

## Talks and demos
- [Giving your LLMs their own crypto wallets](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=62-WGHt-Qdw&list=PLXzKMXK2aHh76O7FfAHPJkZcqTIfYpoyf&index=33) — ETHGlobal Buenos Aires workshop with Bruno Škvorc.
- [Polygon Tracks 101](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3Ba9KkJOsoc) — building on Polygon for developers getting started.
- [Polygon Agent CLI — product demo](https://x.com/gada_akshat/status/2049589017310896550?s=20) — a one-minute feature walkthrough.
- [Launching the Polygon Agent CLI](https://x.com/gada_akshat/status/2029574873190945083?s=20) — launch walkthrough for the agent toolkit.
- [LLM Wallet MCP](https://x.com/gada_akshat/status/1981342070888681699?s=20) — stablecoin payments for Claude and Cursor agents.
- [x402 payments for MCP servers](https://x.com/0xPolygonEco/status/1981060080058716289?s=20) — MCPay and Polygon integration demo.
- [Polygon = Payments](https://x.com/gada_akshat/status/1974919277829648606?s=20) — short payments infrastructure talk.
- [ETHGlobal New Delhi](https://x.com/gada_akshat/status/1971800206745522661?s=20) — developer community work at the Polygon booth.
- [Polygon Agent CLI — launch story](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7435722632295124993/) — developer-facing product launch content.
- [Polygon at ETHGlobal New Delhi](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7377563448672518144/) — developer community engagement.
- [PIP-82 — $1M Agentic Commerce Gas Program](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7427757311714197504/) — a plain-English technical breakdown of the proposal.

## Selected partnerships
- [AgentMail](https://x.com/gada_akshat/status/2072803287729135874?s=20) — added Polygon as an x402-supported chain for machine-payable email.
- [Mastercard](https://x.com/0xPolygon/status/2064707251886334302) — Polygon joined Agent Pay for Machines for trusted agent-to-agent payments.
- [Cloudflare](https://x.com/0xPolygon/status/2072766570892235079?s=20) — x402 payments for pages, datasets, APIs, and MCP tools through the Monetization Gateway.
- Additional service-provider, infrastructure, and ecosystem integrations.

## Contact
Open to roles and conversations across agentic payments, developer relations, product engineering, and x402.
Email: me@akshatgada.com · X: https://x.com/gada_akshat
